description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Testing that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main. The workflow has write-all permissions and consists of two jobs: pytest and coveralls. The pytest job runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of Python and Ansible versions, checks out the code, sets up Python, installs prerequisites, runs pytest, uploads generated SVGs as artifacts, commits the SVG files, publishes a job summary, tests installation in a virtual environment, and uploads coverage to Coveralls. The coveralls job runs on ubuntu-20.04, finishes the coverage, and requires the pytest job to complete.
